message:
feat(demo): expand showcase with new screens and enhanced visualizations

App Infrastructure:
- app.rs: add screen registry with lazy loading for faster startup
- chrome.rs: add FPS counter and memory usage display in debug mode
- cli.rs: add --screen flag to jump directly to specific demo
- Cargo.toml: add optional profiling dependencies

New/Enhanced Screens:
- dashboard.rs: add real-time metrics with sparkline charts, add
  system resource monitoring with animated gauges
- i18n_demo.rs: add RTL text rendering demo, add bidirectional
  text mixing examples, add emoji and complex script support
- terminal_capabilities.rs: add feature detection for sixel, kitty
  graphics, true color; add terminal comparison matrix
- visual_effects.rs: add particle system demo, add gradient text
  effects, add animated borders and glow effects

Improved Screens:
- code_explorer.rs: add syntax highlighting preview, add tree-sitter
  integration demo
- file_browser.rs: add file preview pane with mime detection
- log_search.rs: add regex highlighting in results
- macro_recorder.rs: add playback speed control, add loop mode
- markdown_rich_text.rs: add live preview mode, add theme switching
- shakespeare.rs: add reading progress indicator
- widget_gallery.rs: add interactive property editor

Performance:
- perf_hud_bench.rs: add benchmarks for HUD rendering overhead

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -573,6 +573,11 @@ pub fn accent_for(id: ScreenId) -> theme::ColorToken {
         ScreenId::PerformanceHud => theme::screen_accent::PERFORMANCE,
         ScreenId::I18nDemo => theme::screen_accent::ADVANCED,
         ScreenId::VoiOverlay => theme::screen_accent::PERFORMANCE,
+        ScreenId::InlineModeStory => theme::screen_accent::RESPONSIVE_DEMO,
+        ScreenId::LayoutInspector => theme::screen_accent::LAYOUT_LAB,
+        ScreenId::AccessibilityPanel => theme::screen_accent::ADVANCED,
+        ScreenId::WidgetBuilder => theme::screen_accent::WIDGET_GALLERY,
+        ScreenId::CommandPaletteLab => theme::screen_accent::ADVANCED,
     }
 }
